title: About Us

bodyHtml:
ABOUT LIFESTYLE CLOTHING ZA

Live the Look. Own the Lifestyle.

At Lifestyle Clothing ZA, we're redefining what it means to dress with purpose. Founded in South Africa, our brand was created for individuals who want their wardrobe to reflect who they are, bold, laid-back, driven, and effortlessly stylish.

We don’t follow trends. We build a lifestyle.

From crisp t-shirts and relaxed hoodies to statement caps and others, each piece is designed to blend comfort with clean, timeless style. Our focus is on quality, fit, and versatility, ensuring that you can wear our pieces wherever life takes you.

Our Mission

To deliver clothing that empowers self-expression and confidence without compromising on comfort or quality. We’re here to offer stylish, accessible fashion that’s made to move with you.

Rooted in South Africa. Built for the World.

We're proud of our South African roots, and our designs reflect the energy, creativity, and culture of our people. But our reach is global, we ship to selected international destinations, spreading the lifestyle wherever it’s needed.

Every product is crafted with intention, tested for durability, and made to be worn with pride by anyone, anywhere.

Why Choose Us?

  • Premium Quality Materials — we choose fabrics that last and feel good

  • Effortless Style — our pieces are designed for everyday versatility

  • Fast & Reliable Delivery — across SA and internationally

  • Real People, Real Support — we’re a brand that listens and grows with you

Our Vision

To become a leading street-lifestyle fashion brand in Africa and beyond; known for quality, authenticity, and a bold sense of style that speaks without saying a word.

title: FAQs On Size & Fit
metaDescription: Size & Fit Q: Do you offer size-inclusive clothing?A: Yes! At Lifestyle Clothing, we believe fashion is for every body. Our collections are designed to fit a wide range of sizes — from XS to 5XL in most items. We’re continuously working to expand our range even further to make sure everyone feels seen and celebrat
bodyHtml:
Size & Fit

Q: Do you offer size-inclusive clothing?
A: Yes! At Lifestyle Clothing, we believe fashion is for every body. Our collections are designed to fit a wide range of sizes — from XS to 5XL in most items. We’re continuously working to expand our range even further to make sure everyone feels seen and celebrated.

Q: How do I know which size to order?
A: Each product page includes a detailed size chart with measurements. If you’re unsure, feel free to reach out to us — we’re happy to help you find your perfect fit.

Q: Will your clothes fit curvier or plus-size bodies comfortably?
A: Absolutely. Our garments are made with both style and comfort in mind. Whether you’re curvy, tall, petite, or somewhere in between — we’ve got you covered.

bodyHtml:
Orders & Payment 

Q: How do I place an order?
A: Simply select your items, choose your size and color, then click “Add to Cart.” Once you’re ready, go to checkout and follow the payment instructions.

Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: We accept secure online payments via card, EFT, and other popular methods available at checkout.

Q: Can I change or cancel my order after placing it?
A: If your order hasn’t been processed yet, we’ll do our best to assist. Please contact us immediately at [admin@lifestyleclothingza.com].

title: Product Care
metaDescription: Product Care Q: How should I care for my Lifestyle Clothing pieces?A: We recommend washing items inside out in cold water and air drying to preserve fabric quality and print. Detailed care instructions are included on the label.
bodyHtml:
Product Care

Q: How should I care for my Lifestyle Clothing pieces?
A: We recommend washing items inside out in cold water and air drying to preserve fabric quality and print. Detailed care instructions are included on the label.

title: Privacy Policy

Information We Collect When you browse or shop on our site, we may collect t
bodyHtml:
At Lifestyle Clothing ZA, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your data when you visit our website or make a purchase from us.

1. Information We Collect

When you browse or shop on our site, we may collect the following information:

  • Personal Details – name, email address, phone number, shipping & billing address

  • Payment Information – processed securely via third-party gateways (we never store your credit card details)

  • Order History – purchases made, products viewed, and preferences

  • Device & Usage Info – IP address, browser type, and browsing behavior

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the data we collect to:

  • Process and fulfill your orders

  • Communicate with you regarding your purchases, inquiries, or support requests

  • Improve our store, products, and services

  • Send marketing emails and promotions (only if you opt-in)

  • Detect fraud or misuse of our website

3. How Your Data Is Protected

We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. All payment transactions are encrypted and processed via secure payment providers. We never sell or share your personal data with third parties unless required to fulfill your order or by law.

title: Refund Policy
metaDescription: At Lifestyle Clothing ZA, your satisfaction is our priority. If you’re not completely happy with your purchase, we’re here to help with easy returns and fair refund practices. Returns Eligibility We accept returns within 7 days of the delivery date if: The item is unused, unworn, and in original condition All original
bodyHtml:
At Lifestyle Clothing ZA, your satisfaction is our priority. If you’re not completely happy with your purchase, we’re here to help with easy returns and fair refund practices.

Returns Eligibility

We accept returns within 7 days of the delivery date if:

  • The item is unused, unworn, and in original condition

  • All original tags and packaging are intact

  • You provide proof of purchase (order number or receipt)

Please note: Certain items such as sale items, gift cards, and personalized products may not be eligible for return.

Refunds Process

Once your return is received and inspected:

  1. We will notify you of the approval or rejection of your refund.

  2. If approved, a refund will be processed to your original payment method within 5–10 business days.

  3. You will receive a confirmation email once the refund is completed.

Return Shipping

  • Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer, unless the return is due to a fault on our side (wrong item, defect, etc.).

  • We recommend using a trackable shipping service to avoid lost return packages.
